title: pelargonium × incanescens
intro: Pelargonium × incanescens, a hybrid species in the Geraniaceae family, is a type of perennial herb commonly known as the "candy mint rose geranium." It has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, making it a popular choice in herbal remedies. The health benefits of Pelargonium × incanescens include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium × incanescens can be found in the form of essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall well-being and support immune function.
